title: Organigram Reports Second Quarter Fiscal 2023 Results
text: Organigram Holdings Inc. announced its results for the second quarter ended February 28, 2023 (Q2 Fiscal 2023). Financial Metrics: Q2 Fiscal 2023 adjusted gross margin was $13.4 million, or 34% of net revenue, compared to $8.3 million, or 26%, in Q2 Fiscal 2022. International Performance: Shipped $10.7 million of high margin flower to Australia and Israel in Q2 Fiscal 2023. Profitability: Q2 Fiscal 2023 Adjusted EBITDA was $5.6 million compared to $1.6 million in Q2 Fiscal 2022. The company achieved its 5th consecutive quarter of positive adjusted EBITDA, while maintaining its number three market position among Canadian LPs. Challenges: However, Q2 Fiscal 2023 net loss was $7.5 million, compared to a net loss of $4.0 million in Q2 Fiscal 2022. Revenue Growth: The company reported a 24% year-over-year net revenue increase.
